codeReview.summary: The feature stayed narrowly scoped to the timeout-sensitive CeFi/DeFi overlap assertion and preserved all existing contract checks while converting the timeout to a test-local 15s budget. The worker transcript and handoff show measured runtimes (~3.1–3.9s for the target case, ~3.3s inside the full passing suite), so the change is justified rather than a blind suite-wide relaxation.

summary: Reviewed commit 9847d07 and the worker transcript for baseline-integration-live-data-timeout-hardening. The implementation is correctly scoped, preserves coverage, and uses measured evidence to justify a narrowly targeted timeout increase; no actionable code-review or shared-state issues found.
